rulings.Case Title: FRANCIS COLLINS VS. BENJAMIN KAPLAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MAY 28, 2008 LINE 7. CROSS-COMPLAINANTS BENJAMIN KAPLAN AND THE LAW OFFICES OF KAPLAN & SAM'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART; OVERRULED IN PART. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FOURTH DEFENSE BECAUSE COMPARATIVE FAULT IS NOT A RELEVANT DEFENSE TO A CONTRACT CAUSE OF ACTION. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SIXTH DEFENSE TO PLEAD FACTS WITH MORE PARTICULARITY; AS TO THE SEVENTH DEFENSE WHICH IS UNCLEAR AS PLEAD; AND THE NINTH DEFENSE WHICH IS UNCLEAR AS TO WAIVER. OVERRULED AS TO THE SECOND AND EIGHTH DEFENSE. THE CHALLENGE TO THE MITIGATION DEFENSE CANNOT BE RESOLVED BY DEMURRER AND THE ACCORD AND SATISFACTION DEFENSE IS ADEQUATELY PLEAD. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: 2N DESIGN / BUILD, INC. VS. SHIEKH ELLAHI et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY*****
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MAY 28, 2008 LINE 9. DEFENDANT SHIEKH ELLAHI'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. THE AMENDED COMPLAINT ALLEGES A WRITTEN CONTRACT THAT IS MODIFIED BY AN ORAL AGREEMENT. IT IS NOT POSSIBLE FROM THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT TO ADDRESS DEFENDANT'S CONTENTIONS RELATED TO THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. BOTH PARTIES SEEK TO REFER TO DOCUMENTS AND STATEMENTS BEYOND THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT. THESE CONTENTIONS ARE BEST ADDRESSED BY DISCOVERY AND MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. =(302/PJM)
